assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: Line 56 of claude-md-result.md contains '## Security Configuration'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Product Lifecycle' subsection with all 5 fields: Product pages URL (https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle), Jira version prefix (MYPRODUCT), Vulnerability issue type ID (10200), Component label pattern (pscomponent:), and VEX Justification custom field (customfield_12345)
assertion_results.evidence: Line 58: '### Product Lifecycle'. Line 60: '- Product pages URL: https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle'. Line 61: '- Jira version prefix: MYPRODUCT'. Line 62: '- Vulnerability issue type ID: 10200'. Line 63: '- Component label pattern: pscomponent:'. Line 64: '- VEX Justification custom field: customfield_12345'. All 5 required fields are present with correct values.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Version Streams' subsection with a table containing at least one row for stream 2.1.x with the Konflux release repo URL
assertion_results.evidence: Line 74: '### Version Streams'. Line 76: table with '| 2.1.x | git.downstream.example.com/my-org/product-release.2.1.z | /home/user/product-release.2.1.z | security-matrix.md |'. Stream 2.1.x is present with Konflux release repo URL.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Source Repositories' subsection with a table containing entries for backend and frontend-ui with their GitHub URLs
assertion_results.evidence: Line 79: '### Source Repositories'. Line 82: '| backend | https://github.com/example/backend | upstream |'. Line 83: '| frontend-ui | https://github.com/example/frontend-ui | upstream |'. Both entries present with correct GitHub URLs.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md also contains the standard Project Configuration sections: Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence with Limitations, and Bug Configuration
assertion_results.evidence: Line 18: '## Repository Registry' with table. Line 25: '## Jira Configuration' with all fields. Line 33: '## Code Intelligence' with tool naming docs. Line 46: '### Limitations' subsection. Line 50: '## Bug Configuration' with all fields.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: Line 50: '## Bug Configuration'. Line 52: '- Bug issue type ID: 10001'. Line 53: '- Bug template: [docs/bug-template.md](docs/bug-template.md)'. Line 54: '- Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks'. All three fields present with correct values.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions Security Configuration being opted in by the user and fields being collected
assertion_results.evidence: Line 53: '## Step 10 — Security Configuration'. Line 55: 'User accepted security triage enablement.' Lines 57-68: '### Product Lifecycle fields collected:' listing all fields with values. Lines 70-74: '### Version Streams collected:' with table. assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates Security Configuration and Bug Configuration were newly added along with the other Project Configuration sections
assertion_results.evidence: Line 7: 'The existing CLAUDE.md had no Project Configuration section. The following subsections were created and appended:'. Lines 24-27: '#### `## Bug Configuration`' with three **Added** entries. Lines 29-43: '#### `## Security Configuration`' with **Added** for Product Lifecycle, Version Streams, and Source Repositories. Other standard sections (Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence) also listed as newly added.
